title: IIIT Kota – Medical Officer – 2 Posts

basic_details.job_title: IIIT Kota Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Information Technology Kota (IIIT Kota) Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of Medical Officer. The Walk-in on 25-05-2026. For detailed information please visit IIIT Kota official website.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS Degree or equivalent qualification included in any one of the Schedules to the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956 (102 of 1956), Must be registered in a State Medical Register or the Indian Medical Register, Post Graduate qualification, preferably MD in general, or an equivalent qualification included in any one of the Schedules to the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956 (102 of 1956)
